title: Oozing Potion Backport
description: Brings the new 1.21 Oozing Potion to older versions recreated with an almost 97% accuracy rate.
body:
Lets you finally use the new 1.21 Oozing potion in old versions of minecraft for any people liking old versions. Fully Client/Server Compatible.
If you spot anything off or have ideas, Please let me know!
